name: AvePoint Cloud Data Management REST API
what_it_does: AvePoint cloud data management REST API for enterprises and managed service providers to manage Microsoft 365 data protection, governance, compliance, migration, and operational insights — enabling automated SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive, and Exchange backup, data lifecycle management, permission governance, external sharing control, and migration orchestration through AvePoint's Microsoft 365 data management platform. Enables AI agents to manage backup jobs for Microsoft 365 workload protection automation, handle granular recovery for SharePoint item and Teams conversation restore automation, access data governance for permission audit and oversharing detection automation, retrieve compliance for retention policy and disposition management automation, manage migration for SharePoint and Teams workload migration automation, handle external access for guest user and sharing link governance automation, access operations for Microsoft 365 tenant health monitoring automation, retrieve reporting for Microsoft 365 usage and protection reporting automation, manage multi-tenant for MSP client Microsoft 365 management automation, and integrate AvePoint with SIEM, ITSM, and governance tools for Microsoft 365 management automation.
use_cases: Automating Microsoft 365 backup and granular recovery for enterprise data protection automation agents
Governing SharePoint permissions and external sharing for data security automation agents
Migrating SharePoint and Teams workloads with content mapping for M365 migration automation agents
Managing multi-tenant Microsoft 365 environments for MSP service delivery automation agents
not_for: Non-Microsoft workloads (AvePoint specializes in Microsoft 365/SharePoint ecosystem, not Google Workspace)
Physical server backup (AvePoint is cloud/M365-focused, not traditional infrastructure backup)
Real-time transaction processing (AvePoint is data management and backup, not operational database)
best_when: An enterprise IT team, compliance officer, or managed service provider deeply invested in Microsoft 365 wanting AI agents to automate backup, governance, compliance, and migration for SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive, and Exchange through AvePoint's M365-specialized platform.
avoid_when: MICROSOFT 365 DEPENDENCY: AvePoint is designed for Microsoft 365 ecosystem; automated cross-platform assumption creates coverage_gap for Google Workspace or other SaaS applications; automated should supplement with dedicated backup for non-M365 workloads. GLOBAL ADMIN CONSENT REQUIRED: M365 backup and governance require Azure AD global admin consent; automated standard-user assumption creates consent_required; automated must complete global admin app consent. BACKUP SCHEDULE LAG: AvePoint backup runs on schedule (not real-time); automated continuous-protection assumption creates RPO_gap between backup cycles; automated must understand AvePoint backup frequency per workload. GOVERNANCE SCANS ARE PERIODIC: Permission and governance scans run periodically, not real-time; automated instant-governance assumption creates scan_delay for newly created or shared content; automated must trigger on-demand scans for time-sensitive governance reviews.

auth.notes: AvePoint uses OAuth2 for cloud data management REST API. REST API with JSON. Jersey City, NJ HQ. Founded 2001 by TJ Jiang and Brian Brown. NASDAQ:AVPT (2021 via SPAC). Products: Cloud Backup, Cloud Governance, Confide (security), Fly (migration), Opus (AI governance), Insights. 9M+ users, 21,000+ customers, 3,500+ MSP partners. Microsoft Gold Partner. Competes with Druva, Veeam, and Spanning for Microsoft 365 data protection.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial for 30 days; production requires AvePoint subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user/workload; Cloud Backup, Cloud Governance, and Migration priced separately; MSP partner pricing
pricing.notes: Jersey City NJ. NASDAQ:AVPT. Annual subscription. 21,000+ customers. Microsoft 365 data management leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; backup and governance APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: BACKUP JOB SCOPE IS WORKLOAD-SPECIFIC: AvePoint backup policies are separate per workload (SharePoint, Teams, Exchange); automated unified backup assumption creates coverage_gap for workloads not covered by separate policies; automated must configure policies per workload type

GRANULAR RESTORE REQUIRES FULL BACKUP: SharePoint item-level restore requires associated full backup snapshot; automated instant-item-restore assumption creates restore_unavailable if full backup not captured; automated must ensure full backup frequency aligns with item recovery SLA

GOVERNANCE RULES ARE POLICY-BASED: Permission governance requires defining policy rules before scanning; automated zero-config governance assumption creates no_violations_detected without policy rules; automated must configure governance policies before running reports

M365 THROTTLING AFFECTS BACKUP SPEED: Microsoft Graph API throttling affects AvePoint backup throughput; automated unlimited-speed assumption creates backup_throttled during high-activity periods; automated must expect variable backup completion times due to M365 throttling

MIGRATION MAPPING IS COMPLEX: SharePoint to SharePoint migrations require source-to-destination mapping; automated auto-mapping assumption creates incorrect_migration for renamed sites or restructured content; automated must define explicit migration mappings
agent_readiness.security_notes: M365 data management. SOC2, HIPAA, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. SharePoint, Teams, and Exchange backup data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Microsoft 365 backup. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. M365 tenant and SharePoint content data.
